8. share(karen,stranger_things,lisa) [input(conjecture)]

10. ~share(karen,stranger_things,lisa) [flattening 9]
11. ! [X0] : (binge(karen,X0) | (~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0))) [ennf transformation 2]
12. ! [X0] : (binge(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0)) [flattening 11]
16. ! [X0] : (share(karen,X0,lisa) | (~netflix_show(X0) | ~binge(karen,X0))) [ennf transformation 7]
17. ! [X0] : (share(karen,X0,lisa) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~binge(karen,X0)) [flattening 16]

19. netflix_show(stranger_things) [cnf transformation 1]
20. binge(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
26. share(karen,X0,lisa) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~binge(karen,X0) [cnf transformation 17]
27. ~share(karen,stranger_things,lisa) [cnf transformation 10]
30. ~netflix_show(stranger_things) | ~binge(karen,stranger_things) [resolution 26,27]
31. ~binge(karen,stranger_things) [forward subsumption resolution 30,19]
32. ~netflix_show(stranger_things) | ~popular(stranger_things) [resolution 31,20]
33. ~popular(stranger_things) [forward subsumption resolution 32,19]
34. $false [forward subsumption resolution 33,18]

% Termination reason: Refutation
